  "findings": [
    "Repetitive, sharp impact-like clicking and metallic knocking sounds indicating severe rolling element or raceway spalling",
    "Lack of smooth, continuous lubrication hiss, indicating dry running or contaminated grease"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Schedule immediate shutdown of the conveyor drive to prevent catastrophic shaft or housing damage",
    "Lock out/tag out (LOTO) the drive system",
    "Replace the degraded bearing assembly and inspect the shaft for wear",
    "Flush and replenish with clean, specified lubricant upon installation of the new bearing"
  ],
  "rationale": "The stethoscope recording reveals distinct, periodic metallic impacts and rough clicking rather than a clean, continuous background hum. This is characteristic of a bearing with a spalled race or damaged rolling elements (fatigue/pitting) operating under load, requiring urgent replacement before total seizure occurs.",
  "references": [
    "ISO 10816 (Vibration and acoustic emission guidelines for industrial machines)",
    "SKF Bearing Damage and Failure Analysis Guide"
  ]
}
